title: Shopify & monday - revenue reporting
excerpt:
Hi - We’d like to push our shopify sals data into Monday and to create dashboards.  Is this something that is possible with the monday and shopify integration? 
Thanks

posts.author: brianwbates (Brian Bates)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - We’d like to push our shopify sals data into Monday and to create dashboards. Is this something that is possible with the monday and shopify integration?

Thanks

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @brianwbates - Absolutely! One of our recent clients also uses Shopify, and we’ve not only brought sales orders into monday․com, we also built an abandoned cart workflow and completely customized return process that integrates with custom notifications from their returns warehouse, AfterShip and Zendesk. There are many eCommerce business management processes that can be managed in monday․com. If you would like to chat about your use case, you can book a time with use here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com
